Operation 'getNodes' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about what constitutes a 'node' in the domain context and what information is returned. Enhanced version clarifies the node types, return structure, and required parameters for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Get the list of file nodes in a space's work directory.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve work directory nodes from space
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the hierarchical list of file nodes (datasheets, folders, etc.) in a space's work directory. Returns node metadata including node IDs, names, types, and hierarchy information. Requires the spaceId parameter to identify the target space.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks clarity about what constitutes a 'node' in the domain context and what information is returned. Enhanced version clarifies the node types, return structure, and required parameters for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getRecords' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is too generic. Description mentions pagination but lacks detail about filtering, sorting capabilities, and what data is returned. Enhanced version clarifies the query parameter support and pagination mechanism for better AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Get a paginated list of records from a datasheet.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve paginated records from datasheet
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of records from a specified datasheet. Supports filtering, sorting, and field selection through query parameters. Returns record data with field values and metadata. Pagination is controlled via limit and offset parameters to manage large datasets efficiently.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description mentions pagination but lacks detail about filtering, sorting capabilities, and what data is returned. Enhanced version clarifies the query parameter support and pagination mechanism for better AI agent decision-making about when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'createRecords' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary lacks specificity about the action. Description is minimal and doesn't explain the request format, return values, or persistence behavior. Enhanced version clarifies the input structure, return data including generated IDs, and side effects for AI agents to understand the operation's full impact.

data.current_description: Create one or more records in a datasheet.
data.summary_suggestion: Create new records in datasheet
data.description_suggestion: Creates one or more new records in a specified datasheet. Accepts a CreateRecordsRequest containing an array of record objects with field values. Returns the created records with assigned record IDs and timestamps. Records are immediately persisted and visible to other users with datasheet access.
data.reasoning: Summary lacks specificity about the action. Description is minimal and doesn't explain the request format, return values, or persistence behavior. Enhanced version clarifies the input structure, return data including generated IDs, and side effects for AI agents to understand the operation's full impact.

message: Operation 'updateRecords' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is generic. Description lacks detail about partial update support, what gets returned, and visibility of changes. Enhanced version clarifies the update mechanism, return values, and side effects for better AI agent understanding of update behavior.

data.current_description: Update one or more records in a datasheet.
data.summary_suggestion: Update existing records in datasheet
data.description_suggestion: Updates one or more existing records in a specified datasheet. Accepts an UpdateRecordsRequest containing record IDs and field values to modify. Supports partial updates - only provided fields are changed. Returns the updated records with modified timestamps. Changes are immediately visible to other users.
data.reasoning: Summary is generic. Description lacks detail about partial update support, what gets returned, and visibility of changes. Enhanced version clarifies the update mechanism, return values, and side effects for better AI agent understanding of update behavior.

message: Operation 'deleteRecords' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is too generic. Description lacks critical information about deletion permanence, how records are specified, return values, and potential cascading effects. Enhanced version clarifies the destructive nature, parameter requirements, and side effects for AI agents to understand the operation's significance.

data.current_description: Delete one or more records from a datasheet.
data.summary_suggestion: Delete records from datasheet
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes one or more records from a specified datasheet. Requires record IDs to be specified via query parameters. Deletion is irreversible and immediately visible to all users with datasheet access. Returns confirmation of deleted record IDs. Cascading effects on related data may occur depending on field relationships.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description lacks critical information about deletion permanence, how records are specified, return values, and potential cascading effects. Enhanced version clarifies the destructive nature, parameter requirements, and side effects for AI agents to understand the operation's significance.

message: Operation 'getFields' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_output_details, missing_context. Summary is too generic. Description lacks detail about what field metadata is returned and how this operation relates to record operations. Enhanced version clarifies the returned field information, parameter support, and the operation's role in understanding datasheet schema for AI agents.

data.current_description: Get the list of fields in a datasheet.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve field definitions from datasheet
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete list of field definitions for a specified datasheet. Returns field metadata including field IDs, names, types, properties, and configuration. Supports filtering by field type or visibility status through query parameters. Essential for understanding datasheet structure before creating or updating records.
data.reasoning: Summary is too generic. Description lacks detail about what field metadata is returned and how this operation relates to record operations. Enhanced version clarifies the returned field information, parameter support, and the operation's role in understanding datasheet schema for AI agents.

message: Operation 'createField' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary and description are too minimal. Added clarity about what the operation does (adds field to schema), what inputs are needed (datasheetId and field definition), what is returned (field object with details), and side effects (field becomes available for records). This helps AI agents understand the full scope of the operation.

data.current_description: Create a new field in a datasheet.
data.summary_suggestion: Create a new field in a datasheet
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new field in the specified datasheet with the provided configuration. The field will be added to the datasheet's schema and become available for use in records. Returns the created field object with its ID, name, type, and configuration. The operation requires the datasheetId and field definition in the request body.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too minimal. Added clarity about what the operation does (adds field to schema), what inputs are needed (datasheetId and field definition), what is returned (field object with details), and side effects (field becomes available for records). This helps AI agents understand the full scope of the operation.

message: Operation 'deleteField' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_side_effects. Original description lacks critical details about required parameters (fieldId) and important side effects (impact on existing records). Enhanced version clarifies what parameters are needed and warns about potential data implications, which is crucial for AI agents to understand the operation's impact.

data.current_description: Delete a field from a datasheet.
data.summary_suggestion: Delete a field from a datasheet
data.description_suggestion: Deletes a field from the specified datasheet. Requires the datasheetId and fieldId as parameters. This operation removes the field from the datasheet schema and may affect existing records that contain data in this field. Returns a success response upon completion.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks critical details about required parameters (fieldId) and important side effects (impact on existing records). Enhanced version clarifies what parameters are needed and warns about potential data implications, which is crucial for AI agents to understand the operation's impact.

message: Operation 'getViews' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details. Original description is minimal and doesn't explain what views are or what the response contains. Enhanced version provides domain context (views are perspectives/filters), clarifies the response structure (paginated list with metadata), and specifies required parameters. This helps AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Get the list of views in a datasheet.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all views in a datasheet
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all views configured for the specified datasheet. Views are different perspectives or filters on the datasheet's records. Returns a ViewListResponse containing the views array with view metadata including ID, name, type, and configuration. Requires the datasheetId parameter.
data.reasoning: Original description is minimal and doesn't explain what views are or what the response contains. Enhanced version provides domain context (views are perspectives/filters), clarifies the response structure (paginated list with metadata), and specifies required parameters. This helps AI agents understand when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'uploadAttachment' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description lacks details about how to provide the file (multipart form data), what happens to it (stored and associated), and what is returned. Enhanced version clarifies the input format, explains the operation's effect, and describes the response structure with specific fields, enabling AI agents to properly construct requests and handle responses.

data.current_description: Upload an attachment file to a datasheet.
data.summary_suggestion: Upload a file attachment to a datasheet
data.description_suggestion: Uploads a file attachment to the specified datasheet. The file is sent as multipart form data in the request body. The attachment is stored and associated with the datasheet, and can be referenced in record fields. Returns an AttachmentResponse containing the attachment ID, filename, file size, and URL for accessing the uploaded file.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks details about how to provide the file (multipart form data), what happens to it (stored and associated), and what is returned. Enhanced version clarifies the input format, explains the operation's effect, and describes the response structure with specific fields, enabling AI agents to properly construct requests and handle responses.

data.current_description: Get the list of members in a space.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all members in a space
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all members (users and teams) in the specified space. Returns a MemberListResponse containing the members array with member details including ID, name, email, role, and status. Requires the spaceId parameter. Use this to view all participants and their roles within a space.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic. Enhanced version clarifies what 'members' means (users and teams), specifies the response structure with actual fields, and provides context about use cases. message: Operation 'getRoles' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description lacks context about what roles are and why they matter. Enhanced version explains that roles define permissions and access controls, specifies the response structure, and provides use case context. This helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose in the broader context of member management and access control.

data.current_description: Get the list of roles in a space.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all roles available in a space
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the list of all roles defined in the specified space. Roles define permission levels and access controls for space members. Returns a list of role objects containing role ID, name, description, and associated permissions. Requires the spaceId parameter. Use this to understand the available role options when managing member access.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks context about what roles are and why they matter. data.current_description: Get a paginated list of records from a datasheet.

data.current_description: Create one or more records in a datasheet.
data.summary_suggestion: Create new records in datasheet
data.description_suggestion: Creates one or more new records in a specified datasheet. Accepts a CreateRecordsRequest containing an array of record objects with field values. Returns the created records with assigned record IDs and timestamps. Records are immediately persisted and visible to other users with datasheet access.
data.reasoning: Summary lacks specificity about the action. Description is minimal and doesn't explain the request format, return values, or persistence behavior. data.current_description: Update one or more records in a datasheet.

data.description_suggestion: Updates one or more existing records in a specified datasheet. Accepts an UpdateRecordsRequest containing record IDs and field values to modify. data.current_description: Delete one or more records from a datasheet.

data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes one or more records from a specified datasheet. Requires record IDs to be specified via query parameters. Cascading effects on related data may occur depending on field relationships.
